parameters.query:
SELECT
  cve_id,
  affected_software,
  affected_version,
  CAST(cvss_score AS TEXT) AS cvss_score,
  CAST(epss_score AS TEXT) AS epss_score,
  kev_listed,
  exploitable_on_this_system,
  patch_available,
  fixed_version,
  hitl_required,
  hitl_decision,
  alert_sent,
  exploitability_reason,
  TO_CHAR(created_at, 'DD Mon YYYY') AS scan_date
FROM cve_analyses
WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY cvss_score DESC, created_at DESC
